scripts.dev: tools/with-root-env.sh run 'pnpm run dev:bootstrap && turbo run typegen:watch dev --filter=@wgw/api watch dev --filter=@wgw/apps --concurrency=20'
scripts.dev:ui: tools/with-root-env.sh run 'pnpm run dev:bootstrap && turbo run watch dev --filter=@wgw/apps --concurrency=20'
scripts.dev:preview: tools/with-root-env.sh run 'composer --working-dir packages/api install --no-interaction --prefer-dist && pnpm --filter @wgw/apps run build:dev && pnpm --filter @wgw/apps run sync:runtime && pnpm --filter @wgw/api run sync:runtime && turbo run watch:runtime --filter=@wgw/api --filter=@wgw/apps --concurrency=20'
